announcements.details: Listen to the Homily for the 4th Sunday of Lent by Rev. Fr. Dr. Francis Ward.
announcements.title: Homily: 4th Sunday of Lent

announcements.details: There will be ONE mass on Sunday, 22nd March, 2026. Offertory will be led by the St Vincent de Paul society and Thursday borns. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: Fifth Sunday of Lent

announcements.details: Harvest for 2026 will be launched on Sunday 22nd March, 2026. The theme for the harvest this year is James 1: 17  (NIV) 'Every good and perfect gift is from above, coming down from the Father of the heavenly lights, who does not change like shifting shadows.'
announcements.title: 2026 Harvest Launch

announcements.details: All parishioners who want to purchase the church cloth should kindly register with the church secretary within the week at the church office.
announcements.title: Church Cloth Sales

announcements.details: The St Bakhita Parish 2026 calendars are available for purchase. Any additional revenue generated beyond the cost from this year's sales will go directly into donations towards the needy
announcements.title: 2026 Calendar Sales

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

masses.subtitle: First mass at 7:00am, Second mass at 9:00am
masses.title: Fifth Sunday of Lent

masses.subtitle: Thursday at 7pm
masses.title: Solemnity of St Joseph Husband of Mary

masses.details: Stations of the Cross will be held in the church every Friday during Lent, immediately after the evening mass.
masses.subtitle: Friday at 7pm
masses.title: Stations of the Cross

masses.details: Rosary prayers begin 30 mins before mass
masses.subtitle: Saturday at 6:30am
masses.title: Saturday Morning Mass

sacraments.details: Kindly contact the church office to register for Infant Baptism
sacraments.subtitle: First Saturday of every month, after Grotto Mass
sacraments.title: Infant Baptism

sacraments.subtitle: The St Bakhita Marriage School will re-open soon. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest.
sacraments.title: Marriage School

sacraments.subtitle: Adults: Sunday after first mass; Children: Saturdays at 3pm
sacraments.title: Catechism Classes

sacraments.subtitle: By appointment with the priest in charge.
sacraments.title: Confession
